gist.headline: The buzz on balances
gist.blurb: We've polished up the dashboard copy so it's crystal clear how developer earnings work. Users pay a 25% markup, and the extra pollen goes straight to your balance!
gist.summary: Updated the developer dashboard UI to clarify how app earnings work, standardizing terminology and moving explanations inline.
gist.impact: Developers will see a clearer, inline explanation of the 25% markup system when configuring their app keys.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot organizing coins or pollen grains into a jar labeled 'Balance'. A retro computer screen showing a simple toggle switch. Cozy, warm, financial but cute.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully organizing glowing pollen grains into a glass jar labeled 'BALANCE'. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a simple toggle switch. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
